title: core/src/hpke.rs: seal_for_relay() + unseal_from_relay() functions
description:
What: New module core/src/hpke.rs implementing HPKE seal/unseal using the hpke crate with suite DhKem25519 + HkdfSha256 + ChaCha20Poly1305.

Algorithm:
1. Create /home/mark/WORK/nie/core/src/hpke.rs
2. Define type aliases for the cipher suite:
   type KemX25519 = hpke::kem::X25519HkdfSha256;
   type KdfSha256 = hpke::kdf::HkdfSha256;
   type AeadCha = hpke::aead::ChaCha20Poly1305;
   const INFO: &[u8] = b"nie/sealed/v1";
3. Implement seal_message():
   pub fn seal_message(recipient_pub_key_bytes: &[u8; 32], plaintext: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<u8>>
   - Deserialize public key: KemX25519::PublicKey::from_bytes(recipient_pub_key_bytes)?
   - Call hpke::single_shot_seal::<AeadCha, KdfSha256, KemX25519, _>(
       &OpModeS::Base,
       &recipient_pk,
       INFO,
       plaintext,
       &[],   // aad (empty)
       &mut rand::thread_rng(),
     )?  -> returns (EncappedKey, Vec<u8>)
   - Serialize: encapped_key.to_bytes() + ciphertext
   - Return: [encapped_key_bytes (32)] || [ciphertext]
4. Implement unseal_message():
   pub fn unseal_message(recipient_secret_key_bytes: &[u8; 32], sealed: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<u8>>
   - Validate: sealed.len() >= 32 + 16 (min enc + tag), else Err
   - Parse enc = &sealed[0..32], ciphertext = &sealed[32..]
   - Deserialize private key: KemX25519::PrivateKey::from_bytes(enc)?  // NOTE: enc is the encapped key, not the secret
   - Actually: use KemX25519::EncappedKey::from_bytes(&sealed[0..32])
   - Deserialize recipient secret: ... from StaticSecret or direct bytes
   - Call hpke::single_shot_open::<AeadCha, KdfSha256, KemX25519>(
       &OpModeR::Base,
       &recipient_sk,
       &encapped_key,
       INFO,
       &sealed[32..],
       &[],
     )?
   - Return plaintext
5. Export from core/src/lib.rs: pub mod hpke;
6. Run cargo check -p nie-core

Defensive programming rules:
- Return anyhow::Error wrapping HpkeError variants — never unwrap() on seal/open
- Never log plaintext or key bytes in error paths
- sealed.len() < 48 must return Err before any crypto operation
- The encapped key (enc) for X25519 is always 32 bytes; assert this in a const
- INFO string 'nie/sealed/v1' must be the same in both seal and unseal (domain separation)
- aad is empty [] — document why (no authenticated metadata needed at this layer)
- Do not implement Debug on any type containing key material
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p nie-core exits 0; seal_message + unseal_message exist as public fns; module exported from lib.rs
